response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates substantial software engineering experience and strong communication skills, they lack critical mandatory requirements for this role. C++ experience is limited to 6 months at National Instruments, far below the required 5-10 years. There is no Windows platform development background, no substantial SQL Server/Oracle experience at scale, and zero capital markets or financial services domain expertise. Career trajectory shows deep expertise in web/cloud technologies rather than the Windows/C++ foundation this role requires.
strengths: 16+ years of professional software engineering experience across multiple domains and technology stacks
Demonstrated strong communication and mentoring abilities through public speaking, workshop creation, and community contribution
Proven adaptability and learning capability with experience across diverse languages and platforms
concerns: Critical skills gap: only 6 months of C++ experience versus mandatory requirement of 5-10 years
No Windows platform development experience; entire career focused on web, cloud, and Linux environments
Zero financial services or capital markets domain knowledge; background is in web platforms, GIS, and direct mail automation

key_factors.factor: Capital markets / financial services domain knowledge
General software engineering maturity and communication skills
